name: الرَّحمَٰن
desc: He who wills goodness and mercy for all His creatures

name: الرَّحِيم
desc: He who acts with extreme kindness

name: المَلِك
meaning: The King and Owner of Dominion
desc: The Sovereign Lord, The One with the complete Dominion, the One Whose Dominion is clear from imperfection

name: القُدُّوس
desc: The One who is pure from any imperfection and clear from children and adversaries

name: السَّلَام
meaning: The Perfection and Giver of Peace
desc: The one who provides peace, calm and serenity. By citing this name, we declare peace for ourselves and for those around us.

name: المُؤمِن
meaning: The Granter of Security and Faith
desc: This name is mysterious even for Muslims because "Al-Mu'min" comes from the name "Al-iman" which means to believe, from where comes the name "Al-Mu'minoune" which means believers, it is is the name of the Quran for people who believe in 6 things: the oneness of God, the existence of angels, holy books (Torah, Gospel and Psalms (Zabor) unmodified and the Quran), the prophets, the last day (the day of judgment) and fate its evil and its good. The exact meaning of this name is very difficult to pin down in its original meaning but can be understood from a deeper and more mystical point of view.

name: المُهَيمِن
meaning: The Guardian, The Witness, The Overseer
desc: Whoever dominates His creation and by His omnipotence in all aspects, no state or aspect in this world or the other escapes His will.

name: العَزِيز
meaning: The Almighty, The All-Powerful, The Invincible, The Honorable
desc: The Glorious by His supremacy and His greatness, El-Aziz means in a sense the one who is dear and precious in the eyes of His creatures. He is not the servant of any creature, and no creature dictates to him what to do.

name: الجَبَّار
desc: The grandiose, the ultimate powerful by His greatness and His unlimited strength. When He destroys the oppressors (unjust and sinners) He applies His sentence with righteousness.

name: المُتَكَبِّر
desc: He who is superior to His creatures, no creature has the right to claim greatness.

name: الخَٰلِق
desc: The Creator of all existences, living or dead, mobile or frozen.

name: البَارِي
desc: He who lifts His creation above all faults or imperfections.

name: المُصَوِّر
desc: The one who gives the look and the appearance to each creation from the inside as well as from the outside. In classical Arabic, literally, this word means sculptor and, in modern Arabic, literally means designer.

name: الغَفَّار
meaning: The Constant Forgiver, The Great Forgiver
desc: Is the One who forgives what He wants to whom He wants.

name: القَهَّار
desc: Is the One who is almighty to submit all creation to His will.

name: الوَهَّاب
meaning: The Giver of Gifts, The Bestower
desc: Is the One who gives immensely without receiving anything in return

name: الرَّزَّاق
desc: Is the One who makes distribute to every creature what it needs.

name: الفَتَّاح
desc: Is He Who alone knows the keys to the future and the unknown, by His knowledge and by His wisdom. This name is often associated with the following name "Al-‘Alīm".

name: العَلِيم
desc: The one from whom nothing can hide, for He knows everything and is aware of everything.

name: القَابِض
desc: Is the One who restricts His good according to wisdom.

name: البَاسِط
desc: Is the One who frees, increases and multiplies his good according to wisdom.

name: الخَافِض
desc: Is the One who destines the oppressors and the proud to demeanor and chastisement.

name: الرَّافِع
desc: The Breeder in the sense of raising, the one who elevates the honor, the status and the prestige of a being in this lower world and in the hereafter.

name: المُعِزّ
meaning: The Honourer, The Bestower of Honor
desc: One who offers honor and precious value.

name: المُذِلّ
desc: Is the One who can humiliate and devalue any valiant.

name: السَّمِيع
desc: One who hears any noise or sound in His kingdom emanating from any creature and also One who listens to the invocations of His creatures to respond to their invocations.

name: البَصِير
desc: Is the One from whom nothing that exists or comes into existence can escape without the slightest use of an eye, instrument or organ.

name: الحَكَم
meaning: The Judge, The Giver of Justice
desc: He is the One who judges and decides between creatures here below and in the hereafter and He who ensures equity between the creatures and no one else will and will not be able to decide between them and judge them; and the Judgment in the hereafter will be perfectly just and appropriate.

name: العَدل
desc: Is the One who is free from all forms of injustice and / or oppression.

name: اللَّطِيف
meaning: The Most Gentle, The Subtle One
desc: Is the One who grants his creatures His gentleness and His benevolence.

name: الخَبِير
desc: He is the One from whom cannot be hidden the reality of everything that exists, that is to say the truth of things; no detail escapes Him, neither the thing as a whole, nor each of its parts; and to claim to be able to hide things from the One who creates everything is a delusion and a disbelief.

name: الحَلِيم
desc: Is the One whose patience towards the disbeliefs of sinners exceeds all imagination (it is possible that forgiveness will be granted to them).

name: العَظِيم
desc: This name is difficult to translate because it includes several French words that do not share the same spiritual meaning, but it can be approached as follows: "Al-Adhīm" He who is Gigantic Majestic and Fantastically Grandiose far from any bodily or material imperfection

name: الغَفُور
desc: Is the One who forgives immensely over and over again.

name: الشَّكُور
desc: Is the One who shows His gratitude for worshipers, however incredibly easy to perform.

name: العَلِيّ
desc: Is the One who is above all that He created perfectly and unimaginably.

name: الكَبِير
desc: The Great: One who is greater than His creation, a greatness that only He knows.

name: الحَفِيظ
meaning: The Preserver, The All-Heedful and All-Protecting
desc: Is the One who protects and preserves His good.

name: المُقِيت
desc: Is the One who leaves no detail when He judges, even the most trivial.

name: الحَسِيب
desc: He is the One who will count all the facts of His creatures without forgetting or error.

name: الجَلِيل
desc: Is the One who is perfectly exempt from being compared to His creatures or from being like Him.

name: الكَرِيم
meaning: The Most Generous, The Most Noble
desc: Is the One who flooded His creation with His generosity.

name: الرَّقِيب
desc: Is the One who observes and beholds all that He has created (and the actions of creatures are also creations).

name: المُجِيب
desc: Is the One who answers the invocations of His creatures if He wills and to whom He wills.

name: الوَاسِع
desc: This name in Arabic means: immensely wide, but to qualify God it is understood that He has filled every void and has contained all things in a way that only He knows.

name: الحَكِيم
desc: He whose Wisdom has dazzled, dazzled and will dazzle any conscious and intelligent mind.

name: الوَدُود
desc: This word in Arabic means: The one who draws near to his beloved by mercy, pity and beneficence, but when one reads this name in the "Quran", one feels each time different meanings which are difficult to translate into words}. We can try to translate it: The one who draws near to His servants out of pity although they move away from Him and do not glorify Him.

name: المَجِيد
desc: Is the One who is glorified in the infinitely past, present and eternal.

name: البَاعِث
meaning: The Infuser of New Life, The Resurrector
desc: Is the One who raises the dead and deploys life in whatever He wants, be they men, animals or simply earth.

name: الشَّهِيد
desc: The Witness: Allah is the ultimate and perfect witness to all that has happened in His kingdom, with clear and blatant evidence, perfectly blameless.

name: الحَقّ
desc: Is the One who holds the absolute Truth.

name: الوَكِيل
meaning: The Trustee, The Disposer of Affairs
desc: Is the One who guarantees the sustenance of creatures and the One from whom nothing of their every state can be concealed

name: القَوِيّ
desc: The Mighty: Allah is the most powerful, the strongest, his strength has no limit and is not described with definitions of physical strength.

name: المَتِين
desc: The Enduring: An endurance worthy of Him, unlimited, indefatigable, and which is not marred by any weakness, without pause, without interruption and which no factor can attenuate.

name: الوَلِيّ
desc: Is the One who preserves the believing servants, so the prophets and those who follow them are those who are the "preserved people" in the sense that they have been guided to the obligatory thanks to Him who makes them exist, that is, that is to say with regard to Allah

name: الحَمِيد
desc: Is the One who deserves the thanksgiving, the glorification and the song of praise more than any other

name: المُحصِي
desc: Literally translated as the counter but means the One who counts every creature, every act, every speck of dust in his kingdom and of whom nothing escapes his knowledge

name: المُبدِي
desc: Is the One who gives a beginning to what does not exist without a beginning, without a model, that is to say, the One who creates creatures

name: المُعِيد
desc: Is the One who brings the living back to death after life and the One who brings the dead back to life after death

name: المُحيِي
desc: Is the One who gives life to a mixture of maniyy, that is to say of seminal liquid, devoid of soul and makes him a living being and the One who gives life to the bodies of humans, jinns and angels by reuniting them with their souls during the resurrection

name: المُمِيت
desc: He is the One who kills living beings and the One who cancels out the power of the powerful of this world by death

name: الحَيّ
desc: The Living One: Is the One who does not come into existence and yet exists, and the One who possesses a hayah and this attribute is not a life as is the hayah of creatures made up of a combination of soul, flesh and of blood Imam At-Tahawiyy said in his treatise on belief that "he who attributes to Allah an attribute in a sense which is among those which can be attributed to human beings is disbeliever"

name: القَيُّوم
desc: Is the One who exists, is eternal and does not change and the One who is not affected by non-existence or annihilation and is in no way affected by controlling and creating the acts of human beings

name: الوَاجِد
desc: Is the One who does not need anything and is not reached or concerned with want, lack or need

name: المَاجِد
desc: Is the One who is better than any other and the One who bestows innumerable benefits very widely and without compensation

name: الوَاحِد
desc: The Unique: Is the One who has no alter ego, whether in His Being, in His Act, or in His Attributes. Nothing is like him

name: الأَحَد
desc: The One: Is He Who has uniqueness as an attribute

name: الصَّمَد
desc: Is the One to whom we can rely for any business and who can be called upon for all our needs; One who has no children or parents, neither like nor equivalent, according to Al-Hakim's explanation; The One who needs nothing and the One who everything needs, in order to exist, etc.

name: القَادِر
desc: Is the One who is unaffected by weakness, the One whose power is absolute and dominates all creatures and the One whom absolutely nothing can weaken

name: المُقتَدِر
desc: Is the One who is mighty over all things and the One whose capacities are absolutely limitless

name: المُقَدِّم
desc: Is He who is free from the characteristics of creatures and better than any creature; He who fixes the speed of events, accelerates certain things in the eyes of people according to a destiny and grants each thing a value, a rank, a time and characteristics which suit Him according to wisdom

name: المُؤَخِّر
desc: Is He who is free from the characteristics of creatures and better than any creature; The one who intends the slowness of events and slows down certain things in the eyes of people according to a destiny and grants each thing a value, a rank, a time and characteristics which suit it according to a wisdom (cf no 71)

name: الأَوَّل
desc: The First: Is the One who exists without creatures, without beginning and without time; One who is exempt from being created, from the appearance of a new attribute and from change, One who exists without coming into existence

name: الآخِر
desc: The Last: Is the One who exists without interruption while the creatures are annihilated at every moment; He who is eternal, He who annihilates and is exempt from being annihilated and the disappearance of one or more attributes; The one that exists without being concerned by the notion of end and annihilation

name: الظَّاهِر
desc: Is the One whose existence is manifested in everything by proofs, from the point of view of power and domination and not what would be present in any body from the point of view of place, image and how

name: البَاطِن
meaning: The Hidden One, Knower of the Hidden
desc: Is the One who is preserved from the delusions of creatures attempting to attribute to the Creator human characteristics or characteristics of creatures and the One who creates the characteristics of creatures and their images

name: الوَالِي
desc: Is the One who owns, manages and controls all things and the One who creates everything according to wisdom

name: المُتَعَالِي
desc: Is the One who is free from the attributes of creatures and the One whose power over creatures is boundless

name: البَرّ
desc: Is the One who has the ability to bestow faith and blessings on all creatures, and among them some are grateful and some are not: the former are called Muslims or believers and others are called non-Muslims or non-Muslims. -believers

name: التَّوَاب
desc: Is the One who grants forgiveness to those who repent every time they repent

name: المُنتَقِم
desc: Is the avenger

name: العَفُوّ
desc: Is the One who sets aside and forgives sin and the One who preserves in every seemingly hopeless situation a door to honor, maintenance and blessings or to immediate repentance

name: الرَّءُوف
desc: Is the One who can offer an immensity of benefits without counterpart and without necessity

name: مَالِكُ المُلك
meaning: Master of the Dominion, Owner of the Kingdom
desc: Is the One who creates and attributes according to a destiny all sovereignty, domination, property and all broad power which are granted to certain creatures in this lower world

name: ذُو الجَلَالِ وَالإِكرَام
desc: That is, Allah is the One who is better than any other in reality and all the evidence confirms this and denies the contrary so it is not valid to dispute this point, to deny it or to be hostile against this subject; is the One who fills with blessings those who will have understood this who will know the general holiness, will have success and will be well guided on the Day of Judgment

name: المُقسِط
desc: Is the One who judges according to the greatest justice, the One who is free from all forms of injustice and tyranny, and the One who has absolutely no accountability

name: الجَامِع
desc: Is the One who gathers creatures together on a day of which there is no doubt, the Day of Judgment

name: الغَنِيّ
desc: Is the One who has no need of creatures and whose creatures cannot do without al-Ghaniyy [who is the One who makes them exist and keeps them in existence and constantly changes them]

name: المُغنِي
desc: Is the One who satisfies the needs of creatures and the One who brings them their sustenance

name: المَانِع
desc: Is the One who intends for each creature his victories, his protections and the One from whom they must always be preserved according to a destiny

name: الضَّارّ
desc: Is the One who is almighty to bring inevitably the nuisance which must reach a creature according to a destiny

name: النَّافِع
desc: Is the One who is almighty to bring inevitably the profit that a creature must receive according to a destiny

name: النُّور
desc: The Light: Is the One who guides to their goal those who are prey to temptation and puts them in the right direction according to a destiny; Allah is the One who guides believers to the light of faith, creates light and is not a light that is only a creature

name: الهَادِي
desc: Is the One who intends for certain creatures the benefit of being well guided and of knowing righteousness

name: البَدِيع
desc: Is the One who brings creatures and this world into existence, not from pre-existing matter or in the image of an earlier model, but on the contrary without precursor, model and unprecedented

name: البَاقِي
desc: Is the One whose existence free from annihilation and change is imposed on sound reason which cannot claim the contrary

name: الوَارِث
desc: Is the One who exists and does not change as creatures are wiped out

name: الرَّشِيد
meaning: The Guide to the Right Path
desc: Is the One who guides creatures to what is in their best interests

name: الصَّبُور
desc: Is the One who delays the punishment of sinners by adjusting the accounts of each until a definite day and gives them their ease and time until a time of which they all do not know the date.
